ep2.entry.english: This is the place. Light and water, together.

ep2.sun_reflection_intro.english: The stones are catching the light.

ep2.sun_reflection_wrong.english: The light went the wrong way.

ep2.sun_reflection_solved.english: The symbol is glowing. The compass remembers this.

ep2.water_flow_intro.english: The water wants to go somewhere.

ep2.water_flow_wrong.english: That path leads the water astray.

ep2.water_flow_solved.english: The flowers are drinking. They know the compass.

ep2.mist_symbol_intro.english: Something is hiding in the mist.

ep2.mist_symbol_solved.english: I found it. The mist keeps its secrets well.

ep2.rock_water_intro.english: These marks remember how high the water climbed.

ep2.rock_water_wrong.english: The water didn't climb in that order.

ep2.rock_water_solved.english: The rocks told me everything. The compass is almost ready.

ep2.compass_completed.english: The Mixed Compass is complete. It will guide me wherever I need to go.
